metrics.name: stackra.transfer.jobs.created.total
metrics.description: Xfer jobs entered the queued state.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.jobs.terminal.total
metrics.description: Xfer jobs entered any terminal state (succeeded / partially_succeeded / failed / cancelled). outcome label carries which.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.rows_processed.total
metrics.description: Sum of counters.total on terminal transitions.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.rows_failed.total
metrics.description: Sum of counters.failed — rows that were validated + rejected. Rate signals data quality regressions.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.job_duration_seconds
metrics.description: Time between XferJobStarted and terminal transition.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.concurrent_jobs
metrics.description: Sampled every 30s. In-flight (queued+running) count per tenant. Feeds concurrency-limit health probe.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.stalled_jobs
metrics.description: Sampled every 15min. Jobs in running with last_progress_at > stale threshold.

metrics.name: stackra.transfer.notifications_sent.total
metrics.description: SendXferJobNotificationJob fan-out counter. outcome = delivered / failed / suppressed.
